title: Machine Learning Algorithm Testing Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of testing, evaluating, and refining a machine learning model using a held-out test dataset.
relationships: Training Data is used to create a Trained Model
Trained Model makes Predictions on the unseen Test Dataset
Predictions are compared to actual values to calculate Performance Metrics
Metrics inform the refinement process, leading to a new Refined Model for further testing
